titleStmt.title: SII 42.241: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 241. (A.R. No. 111 of 1955-56.) Maḍutuṟṟu, Sarvasiddhi Taluk, Visakhapatnam District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab fixed into the wall of the Bhīmēśvara temple.
Anantavarman Rājarāja (III) of the Eastern Gangas.
Dated in his 1st regnal year and Śaka 1119, Kanyā-māsa śu. 11, Tuesday, corresponding to A.D. 1197, September 23.

Records the installation of the deity Chōḍīśvara-mahādēva and the grants of lands for maintaining services in the temple by Prōli-seṭṭi and Nāmi-seṭṭi belonging to a merchant-guild (?) called seṭṭikāra.
(Published in Epigraphia Indica, Vol. XLI, pp. 214 ff.).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1119
nēṁṭi śrīmadanantava¨rmmarājarājadē
vara prava¨rddhamāna vijayarājya saṁva
tsaraṁbulu 1 śrāhi kanyāmāsa śukla 11
lu maṁggalavāramunaṁ gaḍarapaṭṭa gaṁggādha
raseṭṭi koḍku gaṇḍa siṁggamuvāri vaṁśa
seṭṭi koḍku malliseṭṭi koḍku settamaseṭṭi
settamaseṭṭi koḍku prōliseṭṭi pōti
seṭṭi vā(nā)miseṭṭi berasinaseṭṭi kāṟānu
la Oṭṭivārunu maṟutoḍti śrī cō
ḍīśvara mahādēvaraṁ bratiṣṭa(ṣṭha) sēyiṁci
guḍi gaṭṭiṁcci prōliseṭṭi dana ceṟuvu
ḍiggiṭa Akkamaseṭṭi ceṟuvu ḍigguṭa
Uṁbaḍi rājula dhammuvugānumadhuḍi Ū
riṁbeṭṭu Uṁḍḍu bhūmi pu 2 Akhaṇḍadī
pamunaku nallabhīmabōyu koḍku cō
ḍi kōnāri vasamunaṁ beṭṭu māḍalu 25
dīpamunaḍiya cōḍi kōnārikiṁ gola
vaḍi paṁdumu [.] cīṁpuṟupalli nāginā
yakuṁḍu dana Ēlina ḍoppapalliṁ gro
ppiṁccina ceṟuvu ḍiggiṭaṁbeṭṭu
bhūmi Ēṁdumu ḍōsūri mā

(ceri) niṁdula ma
luṁḍiyupedda ceṟuvu
ḍiggiṭaṁ be[ṭṭu Unna] nīru bhū
mi Eṁdumu biḍapanāya
kuṁḍu dana Ēlina māru
tūriṁ beṭṭu garuvu paṁ
dumu kōḍūri baṭṭirāju
nicci tāmara ceṟuvu ḍiggi
ṭabeṭṭina Oṁḍḍu bhūmi pu 1
paṁḍivāḍa nāyakulu na
la yēlkiyuṁ bammināyaku
ceṟuvu ḍiggiṭaṁ beṭṭu Uṁ
ḍḍu bhūmi puṭṭiyunu [.]
dēvarakuṁ banniddaṟu sānu
lu mokaṟu liddaṟu vāṁsakā
koṁḍu jyāvāri peṭṭina Āvaja
kāṁḍu maddalya (maddela)kāṟu 2 Ācaṁdrā
¨rkkamugaṁ naḍapeḍidi dīni bannaṁ kā
ṟu 4 [.] Ī dha¨rmmuvuseṭicinavāru sva
dattāḥ (ttāṁ) paradattaṁ(ttāṁ) vā yō A(ha)rēti(ta)
vasundharāṁ(m) [.] ṣaṣṭi¨rvva¨rṣa sahasrāṇi
viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ [.]
dēvarakuṁbhaka
na kuṁḍḍu
[* Lines 45-46 are engraved at the top of the First face of the inscription above the Nandi figure].
Digital edition of SII 42.241 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
